model.license: not-applicable until a concrete ASR artifact is selected

runtime.boundary: Repository-owned task-level C++ adapter and C ABI

host.chip: not captured for blocked ASR record

energy.notes: The runtime projection is not an ASR benchmark.

engineering_cost.conversion_effort: A real licensed ASR model block and loader remain to be selected and implemented.
engineering_cost.update_cost: The direct adapter must be checked across two official MLX releases.
engineering_cost.packaging_cost: Initial static library was 31 MiB and metallib about 155 MiB; kernel selection/stripping is unresolved.

result.blocker: The official MLX runtime and direct Rust boundary execute a representative dense audio block, but no real ASR model has been selected or run, so ASR quality and streaming metrics would be fabricated.
observations: MLX remains a first-class candidate; this blocker is model-path work, not rejection of the runtime.
